title: minuartia decipiens subsp. decipiens
intro: Minuartia decipiens subsp. decipiens, also known as the "deceptive or creeping minuartia," is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and as an expectorant due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve congestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable remedy for common colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its active compounds in a solvent like ethanol.
